scripts.build:extension: pnpm copy:wasm && esbuild extension/src/popup.ts --bundle --outfile=extension/popup.js --format=esm --platform=browser --target=chrome120 --keep-names && esbuild extension/src/offscreen.ts --bundle --outfile=extension/offscreen.js --format=esm --platform=browser --target=chrome120 --keep-names && esbuild extension/src/background.ts --bundle --outfile=extension/background.js --format=iife --platform=browser --target=chrome120 && esbuild extension/src/content-whatsapp.ts --bundle --outfile=extension/content-whatsapp.js --format=iife --platform=browser --target=chrome120 && esbuild extension/src/content-discord.ts --bundle --outfile=extension/content-discord.js --format=iife --platform=browser --target=chrome120 && node -e "const fs=require('fs');const re=/`https:\/\/cdn\.jsdelivr\.net\/npm\/onnxruntime-web@\$\{[^}]*\}\/dist\/`/g;for(const f of ['extension/popup.js','extension/offscreen.js']){fs.writeFileSync(f,fs.readFileSync(f,'utf8').replace(re,'`./wasm/`'));}"
